name: whisper-diarization
description: ⚡️ Blazing fast audio transcription with speaker diarization | Whisper Large V3 Turbo | word & sentence level timestamps | prompt

file_string.description: Either provide: Base64 encoded audio file,
file_string.title: File String

file_url.description: Or provide: A direct audio file URL
file_url.title: File Url

group_segments.description: Group segments of same speaker shorter apart than 2 seconds
group_segments.title: Group Segments

language.description: Language of the spoken words as a language code like 'en'. Leave empty to auto detect language.
language.title: Language

num_speakers.description: Number of speakers, leave empty to autodetect.
num_speakers.title: Num Speakers

prompt.description: Vocabulary: provide names, acronyms and loanwords in a list. Use punctuation for best accuracy.
prompt.title: Prompt
